UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Feru Hunt.
Attorney Bill Ford appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ahlam Abdoun and Heba Abdoun are present.
Attorney Robert O'Leary representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Toni Young, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of Jan. 14, 2013 vacated. (501/JPT)
